title: Wooden Puzzles for Adults and Kids, Mandala Hummingbird Jigsaw Puzzle, 300 Pieces, Colorful with Exquisite Box, Suitable for Home Decor and Gifts
features: 💖Wooden Puzzles for Adults: This wooden puzzle is composed of small pieces of various shapes, with bright colors. The unique block shape and ingenious detail design will bring you and your family a pleasant family gaming experience and fully enjoy your happy family time.

💖Perfect Gift Choice: This beautifully packaged wooden puzzle is the perfect gift for birthday or any holiday. After completing the puzzle, you can frame it to decorate your bedroom, dining room, living room, etc. It is a very fashionable and meaningful home decor.

💖Family Puzzle Game: This adult puzzle game can help you relax in your free time and alleviate the stress and fatigue in work and life. It can also improve your child's ability to think and solve problems, enhance his concentration, cultivate his care and patience, and improve his concentration.

💖High Quality Material: This wooden puzzle is made of high-quality wood and has great print quality. With the newly upgraded laser cutting technology, the edges of the puzzle are free of burrs and won't hurt your hands. It is safe and reliable, and is very suitable for children to play.

💖Perfect After Sales Service: We value every customer's shopping experience and believe the quality of our products. If there are missing pieces or damages after receiving the product, please feel free to contact us.
description: Product Description Colorful Wooden Jigsaw Puzzles for Adults and Kids Unique and Multifunctional Wooden Puzzles If you are a puzzle enthusiast, you will love this cute and beautiful wooden puzzle. This wooden puzzle has unique shape and bright colors, suitable for adults and children. It can not only help adults relax after work, but also can cultivate children's hands-on ability and patience. Wonderful Decorations Each of our wooden puzzles features a unique nature-themed shape, from various wild animals to trees and nuts. After completing the puzzle, you can frame it in bedrooms, restaurants, living rooms or other places as a display decoration. Perfect Puzzle Game for Family When you are with your family and looking for a game to play together, you can work with your child to piece together this puzzle. This wooden puzzle using the latest upgraded laser cutting technology, the edges of the puzzle are free of burrs, and all fragments are smooth, you can enjoy happy parent-child time with peace of mind. Perfect Gift and Decoration Looking for a thoughtful birthday gifts or holiday present? These unique shaped puzzles will be the best choice for your friends or family! Give your loved ones hours of entertainment and leisure. After you successfully complete the puzzle, you can glue it and frame it on the wall of the bedroom or living room, so that you can enjoy the results of your work at any time. At the same time, it can also decorate the room and add different colors. Perfect Laser Cutting The latest upgraded laser cutting technology, all fragments are smooth. Rich Colors Vivid color for every puzzle pieces. Lovely decorations for your house. Perfect Gifts Our wooden puzzles comes in exquisite wooden packaging, making it the perfect gift.
